item.title: #ぼっち・ざ・ろっく 喜多郁代(ダーウィンが喜多ver.) 最近ぼざろの絵が多くなってますね。。 来週は出来れば違う二次…

item.title: "ShoreFreakのヘビロテ"033 Cutemen「RELAX」 youtu.be/jZavpzMosyk?.…
item.author: ShoreFreak (@shorefreak.bsky.social)
item.description:
"ShoreFreakのヘビロテ"033

Cutemen「RELAX」

youtu.be/jZavpzMosyk?...

CMJKとPicorinのユニット「Cutemen」です
アルバム「COVERS & MELLOW TUNES」からです
CMJKは電気グルーヴやアイドルグループの楽曲提供でも有名ですね

英国のバンド「Frankie Goes To Hollywood」のカバーです
本家の曲は詞の内容やMVの過激さからBBC、NHKなどでは確か放送禁止になってます

原曲よりもBPMがかなり速く、”ハードコアテクノ”なアレンジ
かなり細かくシンセの音色が切り替わっていきます
item.content:encoded:
"ShoreFreakのヘビロテ"033

Cutemen「RELAX」

youtu.be/jZavpzMosyk?...

CMJKとPicorinのユニット「Cutemen」です
アルバム「COVERS & MELLOW TUNES」からです
CMJKは電気グルーヴやアイドルグループの楽曲提供でも有名ですね

英国のバンド「Frankie Goes To Hollywood」のカバーです
本家の曲は詞の内容やMVの過激さからBBC、NHKなどでは確か放送禁止になってます

原曲よりもBPMがかなり速く、”ハードコアテクノ”なアレンジ
かなり細かくシンセの音色が切り替わっていきます

item.title: Happy Cirno Sunday! The current vibe is thinking about the P…
item.author: Chris Monka (@chrismonka.bsky.social)
item.description: Happy Cirno Sunday! The current vibe is thinking about the Pop Team Epic anime! ngl Pop Team Epic was so amazing 🥹 the first season is one of the funniest things I've ever seen, and the opening was beautiful, it was immaculate 😭 I hope you have a wonderful day, I send love and positivity your way 💛☺️
item.content:encoded: Happy Cirno Sunday! The current vibe is thinking about the Pop Team Epic anime! ngl Pop Team Epic was so amazing 🥹 the first season is one of the funniest things I've ever seen, and the opening was beautiful, it was immaculate 😭 I hope you have a wonderful day, I send love and positivity your way 💛☺️

item.title: 7月12日 日曜日☀️室温32.3℃ ２連勤終了なり。。。 明日は休みなり。。 今日も暑かった…🫠 疲れたぁ～🫠 今…

２連勤終了なり。。。

明日は休みなり。。
今日も暑かった…🫠
疲れたぁ～🫠

item.title: ウクライナ首相のスビリデンコ氏交代へ ゼレンスキー氏表明、求心力回復狙い www.nikkei.com/article/…
item.author: 日経電子版 (@nikkei.com)
item.description:
ウクライナ首相のスビリデンコ氏交代へ　ゼレンスキー氏表明、求心力回復狙い
www.nikkei.com/article/DGXZQO...

背景にあるのが2025年11月に発覚した国営原子力企業をめぐる大規模な汚職事件です。

スビリデンコ氏の「後見役」とされたイエルマーク前大統領府長官が汚職への関与が疑われ、失脚しました。

政権への批判がくすぶっており、人事刷新で求心力を回復する狙いが浮かびます。
item.content:encoded:
ウクライナ首相のスビリデンコ氏交代へ　ゼレンスキー氏表明、求心力回復狙い
www.nikkei.com/article/DGXZQO...

背景にあるのが2025年11月に発覚した国営原子力企業をめぐる大規模な汚職事件です。

スビリデンコ氏の「後見役」とされたイエルマーク前大統領府長官が汚職への関与が疑われ、失脚しました。

政権への批判がくすぶっており、人事刷新で求心力を回復する狙いが浮かびます。

item.title: Sources: Cursor is building a general-purpose AI agent coden…
item.author: Techmeme (@techmeme.com)
item.description:

item.content:encoded:

item.title: I played Echo Isle! The game took little under 1.5 hours to …
item.author: Chris Monka (@chrismonka.bsky.social)
item.description: I played Echo Isle! The game took little under 1.5 hours to beat. This was an insanely cool game! The game did an amazing job of emulating the look and feel of an old school Zelda game, everything from the graphics to the gameplay were spot on! It was a really fun, charming, and nostalgic game!
item.content:encoded: I played Echo Isle! The game took little under 1.5 hours to beat. This was an insanely cool game! The game did an amazing job of emulating the look and feel of an old school Zelda game, everything from the graphics to the gameplay were spot on! It was a really fun, charming, and nostalgic game!

item.title: Erling Haaland and the rest of the Norwegian men's team are …
item.author: Max B 💙 🔶 🇺🇦 🇬🇧 🇪🇺 (@maxbrockbank.com)
item.description:
Erling Haaland and the rest of the Norwegian men's team are paid the same as the women's team.

In 2017, they took a voluntary pay cut to allow the women's pay to be increased.

The move came from the players' union, not management.
item.content:encoded:
Erling Haaland and the rest of the Norwegian men's team are paid the same as the women's team.

In 2017, they took a voluntary pay cut to allow the women's pay to be increased.

The move came from the players' union, not management.

item.title: Apple’s new Mac chip road map represents the company’s lates…
item.author: Bloomberg News (@bloomberg.com)
item.description:
Apple’s new Mac chip road map represents the company’s latest move to rebuild its operations for the artificial intelligence world, writes Mark Gurman.

Read the latest edition of the Power On newsletter here: bloom.bg/3QOLEGn

📷️: Adam Gray/Bloomberg
item.content:encoded:
Apple’s new Mac chip road map represents the company’s latest move to rebuild its operations for the artificial intelligence world, writes Mark Gurman.

Read the latest edition of the Power On newsletter here: bloom.bg/3QOLEGn

📷️: Adam Gray/Bloomberg

item.title: In 1997, a court ruled New York violated its own welfare law…
item.author: ProPublica (@propublica.org)
item.description:
In 1997, a court ruled New York violated its own welfare laws by offering too small an allowance to put toward rent, leaving poor families with children at risk of homelessness.

A new lawsuit argues that three decades later, that’s still happening.

w/ @nysfocus.com
item.content:encoded:
In 1997, a court ruled New York violated its own welfare laws by offering too small an allowance to put toward rent, leaving poor families with children at risk of homelessness.

A new lawsuit argues that three decades later, that’s still happening.

w/ @nysfocus.com

item.title: A tourist was hospitalized after a visibly agitated bison fl…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: A tourist was hospitalized after a visibly agitated bison flipped him about eight feet in the air near a campground road in Yellowstone National Park. The man suffered multiple broken bones.
item.content:encoded: A tourist was hospitalized after a visibly agitated bison flipped him about eight feet in the air near a campground road in Yellowstone National Park. The man suffered multiple broken bones.

item.title: You're looking at a 200 year-old wisteria vine at Byakugou-j…
item.author: c0nc0rdance (@c0nc0rdance.bsky.social)
item.description:
You're looking at a 200 year-old wisteria vine at Byakugou-ji Temple in Tamba, Hyogo, Japan.

The delicate pink/purple blossoms create an otherworldly place where magic can happen.

But here's an interesting fact: wisteria are in the legume family (Fabaceae). This is a magic beanstalk.
item.content:encoded:
You're looking at a 200 year-old wisteria vine at Byakugou-ji Temple in Tamba, Hyogo, Japan.

The delicate pink/purple blossoms create an otherworldly place where magic can happen.

But here's an interesting fact: wisteria are in the legume family (Fabaceae). This is a magic beanstalk.

item.title: California's desert transforms into a sea of wildflowers dur…
item.author: Digital Brain (@yourdigitalbrain.bsky.social)
item.description: California's desert transforms into a sea of wildflowers during a super bloom, a rare event that can take over a decade to return. Poppies, phacelia, and sunflowers take over Anza-Borrego and Death Va
item.content:encoded: California's desert transforms into a sea of wildflowers during a super bloom, a rare event that can take over a decade to return. Poppies, phacelia, and sunflowers take over Anza-Borrego and Death Va

item.title: おはようございます‼️ 始まりましたの月曜日、今週もよろしくお願いします🙏 週初から何ですが日々生活していれば、 良…
item.author: YellowSafe (@yellowsafe.net)
item.description:
おはようございます‼️
始まりましたの月曜日、今週もよろしくお願いします🙏

週初から何ですが日々生活していれば、
良いこと、良くないこと、いろいろあるかと

そして…時に前に進もうとしても進まないことがあるのも事実

そんな時は振り出しに戻っただけ
そう考えれば気が楽になるのでしょうね

今いる場所が同じでもフロアが異なるはず
経験値アップで再チャレンジするのがよろしいかと😊

本日もよろしくお願いします🙇
item.content:encoded:
おはようございます‼️
始まりましたの月曜日、今週もよろしくお願いします🙏

週初から何ですが日々生活していれば、
良いこと、良くないこと、いろいろあるかと

そして…時に前に進もうとしても進まないことがあるのも事実

そんな時は振り出しに戻っただけ
そう考えれば気が楽になるのでしょうね

今いる場所が同じでもフロアが異なるはず
経験値アップで再チャレンジするのがよろしいかと😊

本日もよろしくお願いします🙇

item.title: An allegory in the spirit of Animal Farm, the Australian pla…
item.author: Guardian US (@us.theguardian.com)
item.description: An allegory in the spirit of Animal Farm, the Australian playwright’s debut novel about a disfigured chicken is a fantastical fable that’s both funny and ‘a bit bleak’
item.content:encoded: An allegory in the spirit of Animal Farm, the Australian playwright’s debut novel about a disfigured chicken is a fantastical fable that’s both funny and ‘a bit bleak’
